title: [MTR3/4] 209系500番台|JR 209-500 series
description: Resource pack that adds JR 209-500 series into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **JR 209-500 series** are trains produced by JR East Niitsu Rolling Stock Plant between 1998 and 2000. A total of 17 10-car trains are produced for the Chūō–Sōbu Line to act as a stop-gap measure until the new E231 series is delivered, as the older 101 and 103 series frequently break down to a point that JR East requires new trains as soon as possible. These trains use 209 series as the base, and use the bodyshell from the E231 series (of which it has been developed). However, these 17 209-500 series didn't last long on the Chūō–Sōbu Line as trains are transferred to different lines, including the Keihin–Tōhoku Line, and the Keiyō Line after a matter of a few months to years as they are required by other lines to replace their older rolling stock. Today, 11 8-car 209-500 series works on the Musashino Line, the 10-car KeYo 34 formation on the Keiyō Line (to fill in the gap for the scrapped E331 series), and 5 209-500 series converted into 209-3500 series for Hachikō/Kawagoe Lines.

This resource pack is to add the JR 209-500 series into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2024.

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, East Japan Railway Company.
